raw_consumer_statement:
Refund Request for Duplicate Charge {$490.00} Dear XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, I am writing to formally request your assistance in resolving a duplicate charge of {$490.00} made to my American Express account for a scooter purchased on XXXX. Despite prior attempts to resolve this issue through standard customer service channels, the erroneous charge has not been refunded. 

Summary of the Issue : Item : Scooter ( purchased via XXXX ) Amount in dispute : {$490.00} Issue : The order was charged twice on my credit card One charge was initially reversed, but XXXX re-charged the same amount on XX/XX/XXXX This has resulted in an unresolved duplicate charge Timeline Evidence ( from American Express billing statement dated XX/XX/XXXX ) : DISPUTE CREDIT XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX Followed by DISPUTE CR REVERSAL XXXX XXXX the same day Followed by another XXXX XXXX charge This demonstrates an erroneous re-posting of the same transaction. 

Requested Resolution : 1. Issue an immediate refund in the amount of {$490.00} 2. Provide written confirmation that the refund has been submitted 3. Notify American Express that the charge has been corrected Reason for Corporate Contact : Repeated attempts to resolve the issue through customer service have failed. The matter has escalated unnecessarily, and I am seeking corporate assistance for prompt resolution. 

Contact Information : Name : XXXX XXXX Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt response. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
